core_message: [AMK: one paragraph — what the audience should feel and why it matters now. No comparative superiority without evidence.]
target_audience: [AMK: primary segment, age band intent, regions, and what they already love — avoid PII.]
emotional_tone: [AMK: 3–6 adjectives plus one line on what we never joke about.]
world_setting: [AMK: where and when; rules the viewer must understand in ninety seconds; what stays mysterious for the feature.]

main_characters.role_note: [AMK: want, flaw, arc beat visible in trailer.]
[AMK: force opposing the want — person, system, or inner conflict.]
[AMK: relationship that carries humour or heart — or remove if teaser is solo.]

trailer_structure: Hook (0–5s): [AMK: image or line that earns attention without misleading.]
Stakes (5–25s): [AMK: what can be lost or gained.]
Escalation (25–50s): [AMK: choice, reveal, or set-piece tease.]
Button (75–90s): [AMK: title card, date card, or cliffhanger — honest to product.]
song_seed_hooks: [AMK: chorus emotional thesis — one line, no borrowed lyric.]
[AMK: verse contrast — what is quiet versus loud in the story.]
[AMK: bridge lift — optional key change or silence before drop.]
[AMK: palette — acoustic, electronic, hybrid, or orchestral intent only.]
podcast_episode_angle: [AMK: behind-the-vision spine — origin of the idea, one ethical line we will not cross in the room, one craft lesson. Not a transcript of unreleased film.]
marketing_hook_candidates: [AMK: community or fandom alignment — inclusive, non-exploitative.]
poster_key_art_direction: [AMK: single hero image idea, palette, negative space for title, mood reference films for tone only — not frame theft.]
pdf_or_ebook_angle: [AMK: companion PDF or e-book slice — world bible excerpt, director statement, or study guide; clarify free vs paid only after Z-SUSBV if commercial.]
rights_and_originality_notes: Original story elements and commissioned art preferred. Third-party references require clearance log. Likeness and living-person allusions require consent path. Music hooks are thematic only — not a license to sync existing masters.
amk_decision_questions: Is the trailer honest to the final feature or series rating intent?
Which beats depend on temp music or stock — list replacement plan?
Does any hook imply pricing, donation, or purchase — if yes, route Z-SUSBV and entitlement review?
Are minors or sensitive populations depicted — if yes, confirm child and privacy review path?
When do we want a public lane versus perpetual internal lab — who signs that gate?
forbidden_actions: live AI or provider calls for generation
generated video, audio, or raster art shipped from this seed
copying protected frames, lyrics, or key art
mimicking protected living artists without permission
public upload, broadcast, or ad spend without AMK release gate
deployment, billing change, or bridge execution from this artefact
guaranteed outcome or superlative claims without evidence
required_human_gates: AMK creative sign-off on core message and tone
Rights and IP review before external materials
Music and audio rights review before public sync or stream
Public release and marketing lane opened only by AMK or human
Child and privacy review if youth or sensitive depictions apply
Z-SUSBV and entitlement review if any commercial or price language appears
